'''Ruten''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Cerenia system/Legends|Cerenia system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] liberated the planet from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Bursthed]]. The planet hosted the [[Ruten Pet Show]].

==Appearances==
